title: Suppression
description: An intent's judgment to dismiss/defer a Finding (agency/capabilities/intent/_main.py; Spec 381 §4). SERVES the intent; SUPPRESSES the analyze Finding (cross-capability edge). Scan-time scoring drops a finding matching a live Suppression (risk + file glob); an expired one lets the finding resurface (keep-both — the Finding is never deleted).

risk.description: The decay-risk code being suppressed ('R1'-'R6', 'T1'-'T6', or a custom 'Cx').

glob.description: The file glob the suppression applies to (named 'glob' not 'pattern' — graphqlite reserves 'pattern').

reason.description: Why the finding was dismissed/deferred — the judgment's provenance.

expires.description: Optional epoch after which the suppression lapses and the finding resurfaces (defer defaults +90d); absent = no expiry.
